description_for_human: Marketplace of paid APIs for AI agents. Discover and pay per request in USDC via the x402 protocol — no API keys, no subscriptions.
description_for_model: PayAPI Market exposes a curated catalog of paid APIs that accept x402 (per-request USDC) payments and are reachable over MCP. Use this plugin to list available APIs, look up endpoints, and connect agents to the marketplace MCP SSE endpoint at https://web-production-18a32.up.railway.app/mcp/sse. Providers keep 97% of revenue. Listing is free.
